title: Station v1: single-user Beads-compatible CLI with pluggable backend foundation
description: Build the first production-ready release of Station as a repo-scoped, single-user issue tracker. Preserve Beads core workflow and command semantics while intentionally omitting multi-user/collaboration operations in v1.
design: Tech stack: TypeScript + Node + commander + better-sqlite3. Station stores state in-repo under .station/. SQLite is the only active backend in v1. Design in a backend interface now so Linear/Asana adapters can be added later without rewiring command handlers. Strict dependency semantics: ready queue includes only issues with no unresolved blocks dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: CLI can initialize and operate in a git repo without Beads installed. Core command families are available with machine-readable JSON output. Multi-user/collab command families are absent from v1 scope. Architecture includes backend abstraction with SQLite implementation and stub adapters for Linear/Asana.

title: Bootstrap Station CLI scaffolding and repo-local config
description: Create the TypeScript project scaffold for Station with commander-based CLI entrypoint, build/test scripts, and repo-local config resolution.
design: Implement command registration pattern that keeps command parser separate from business logic. Define .station/ directory conventions (db path, config path, lock path) and central path resolver utilities. Add station info/init commands early to verify lifecycle in a git repo.
acceptance_criteria: station --help and station info --json both work. station init creates required repo-local directories/files idempotently. CLI has structured error handling and a consistent JSON envelope for success/failure.
notes: Implemented initial Station scaffolding with commander CLI, repo-root path resolution, .station init/info commands, and consistent JSON success/failure envelope. Verified via lint/typecheck/build and direct CLI invocations for --help/info/init.
close_reason: CLI scaffold, repo-local config lifecycle, and JSON envelope/error handling implemented and validated.

title: Automate release packaging for Station CLI
description: Define and implement a repeatable release process for versioning, changelog generation, and publishing Station artifacts.
design: Add scripts/workflows for semantic version bump, changelog update, tag creation, and npm package publication (or equivalent chosen artifact). Include dry-run mode and rollback notes.
acceptance_criteria: Maintainer can run one documented flow to produce and publish a release artifact. Release process supports dry-run verification before publish. Version tags and changelog remain consistent.

title: Complete non-collab command parity audit and close gaps
description: Audit Station command coverage against Beads and implement remaining single-user command gaps that are in-scope for v1.
design: Generate a parity matrix from Beads CLI docs. Exclude collab/ops families by policy. For in-scope gaps (for example stale, duplicates, merge if selected), either implement with tests or explicitly defer with rationale approved in docs.
acceptance_criteria: There is a checked-in parity matrix mapping Beads commands to Station status: implemented, intentionally excluded, or deferred. All in-scope non-collab commands are implemented with tests, or explicitly deferred with rationale.

title: Implement SQLite persistence layer and schema for core entities
description: Add SQLite storage with schema management for issues, dependencies, labels, and audit events needed by core command flows.
design: Use better-sqlite3 with explicit repository layer and transaction helpers. Include schema version table and deterministic migration runner. Keep schema focused on v1 (single-user) while preserving room for backend IDs and metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Database initializes under .station/ with versioned schema. Re-running init/migrations is safe. CRUD operations for issues/dependencies/labels are covered by tests and do not require network access.
notes: Added better-sqlite3 database bootstrap with migration runner/version table, schema for issues/dependencies/labels/audit events, and repository CRUD primitives. Added storage tests covering idempotent migration/init and issue/dependency/label round-trips.
close_reason: SQLite persistence with versioned schema/migrations and CRUD repository implemented with passing storage tests.

title: Implement core issue lifecycle commands with Beads-like semantics
description: Implement create/list/show/update/close/reopen commands and flags aligned with Beads core behavior for single-user workflows.
design: Map command handlers to service methods; keep CLI-specific validation at edges. Preserve familiar fields: type, priority, status, title, description, design, notes, acceptance. Ensure close/reopen keep auditability and updated timestamps.
acceptance_criteria: All lifecycle commands support --json output and round-trip data correctly. Command behavior matches expected Beads-style semantics for single-user use. Invalid flag combinations return actionable errors.
notes: Implemented Beads-like issue lifecycle command family (create/list/show/update/close/reopen) with JSON output and strict validation for status/priority/update field requirements. Added integration tests proving lifecycle round-trips and actionable error envelopes for invalid flag combinations.
close_reason: Core lifecycle command family implemented with JSON output, validation, and passing integration tests.

title: Implement dependency and ready-queue semantics
description: Add dependency commands and ready queue logic with strict blocker semantics.
design: Support dep add/remove/list/tree plus dependency types needed in v1 (at minimum blocks, related, discovered-from, parent-child). Ready queue query must exclude blocked issues deterministically. Include cycle-prevention and clear error messages for invalid relationships.
acceptance_criteria: The station dep command family works end-to-end. station ready --json returns only unblocked actionable issues. Dependency graph operations are tested, including cycle and missing-id failure paths.
notes: Implemented dependency command family (dep add/remove/list/tree) and ready queue command with strict blocker semantics (blocks dependencies on non-closed issues). Added cycle prevention and self-reference guards plus integration tests covering happy path, cycles, and missing-id failures.

title: Implement labels and advanced list filtering/search
description: Add label management and list filtering features expected from Beads core CLI usage.
design: Implement label add/remove/list/list-all plus list filters for status, priority, type, ids, labels (all/any), and basic text contains for title/description/notes. Keep query building in repository layer to avoid handler duplication.
acceptance_criteria: Label commands update/query labels correctly. station list supports compound filters and returns stable sorted output. Filter behavior is validated with integration tests.

title: Define backend abstraction with SQLite adapter and external stubs
description: Create backend interface and plug-in registration that powers Station commands while keeping SQLite as only active v1 backend.
design: Define a backend contract for issue/dependency/label operations and capability checks. Implement full SQLite adapter. Add Linear and Asana adapter stubs that compile, self-identify as unsupported, and are never invoked by default.
acceptance_criteria: Backend interface is documented and used by command services. SQLite backend passes full command tests. Linear/Asana stubs are present with explicit not-implemented errors and smoke tests.

title: Enforce v1 scope boundaries for single-user mode
description: Ensure collaboration-oriented Beads features are intentionally absent in Station v1 and documented as deferred.
design: Do not ship command families for sync/daemons/import-export/migrate/admin/agents/worktrees/gates/chemistry. Add explicit docs and CLI UX messaging so users understand what is intentionally deferred vs accidentally missing.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported command families are not implemented in v1 code paths. Docs include a clear included-vs-excluded matrix. No hidden dependencies on daemon/git-sync behavior remain.

title: Build command-level test suite and CI gates
description: Create the test harness and CI pipeline that validates Station core command behavior and backend contracts.
design: Add unit tests for services and integration tests for CLI commands using fixture repos and ephemeral SQLite DBs. CI must run lint, typecheck, and tests on every PR. Include smoke coverage for unsupported backend stubs.
acceptance_criteria: CI reliably runs lint/typecheck/tests and fails on regressions. Integration tests cover create/list/show/update/close/reopen, deps, labels, and ready semantics. Backend stub behavior is tested for explicit not-implemented responses.

title: Document v1 usage, parity, and scope boundaries
description: Write the Station README and operator docs for install, quickstart, command usage, and intentional differences from Beads.
design: Document repo-scoped model, .station layout, JSON output examples, and command reference for v1-supported commands. Include an explicit excluded-features table for non-v1 command families.
acceptance_criteria: README enables a new user to install, init, and run core Station workflows end-to-end. Docs clearly list included vs excluded command families. JSON examples are copy/paste valid.
